overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character moves from a covered pedestrian walkway into a busy downtown intersection filled with holographic billboards and towering skyscrapers, then continues along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with red neon ceiling lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath red neon lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue hoodie walking past the camera

entered.detail: concrete ceiling structure with exposed pipes and red neon strips
bright red neon strips running along the ceiling of the walkway
large structural concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure
glowing advertisements visible at the end of the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by intense red neon lighting overhead. The environment is sheltered with concrete pillars lining the left side, while the street is visible to the right. Sparse pedestrians move through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with large holographic billboards

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with Mishka Studios building visible ahead
approaching crosswalk with vehicles visible on the right side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking toward and beginning to cross the intersection while approaching the Mishka Studios building

notable_agents.action: black sedan waiting at the intersection traffic light

entered.detail: large red building with prominent yellow 'MISHKA STUDIOS' signage
night sky visible above the towering skyscrapers
tall palm trees lining the edge of the intersection
large glowing digital advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a vast open intersection dominated by the Mishka Studios building with its bright yellow signage. The environment shifts from enclosed to exposed, with towering glass skyscrapers and holographic billboards surrounding the area. The character approaches the crosswalk as vehicles wait at the traffic light.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with towering skyscrapers and digital advertisements

events.description: turning right while crossing the intersection toward the sidewalk
multiple vehicles passing through the intersection including a black sedan and a red sports car

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and turning right while navigating through the intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection ahead of the character

entered.detail: various cars driving through the intersection with headlights on
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the wide intersection, turning right while surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. Vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt streets, reflecting the neon lights. The Mishka Studios building moves to the left side as the character navigates the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk lined with holographic advertisements and storefronts

events.description: transitioning from street crossing to sidewalk walking alongside concrete barriers
slight adjustment to avoid pedestrians while continuing along the pedestrian path

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past other pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: low concrete walls separating the sidewalk from the street
commercial building entrances with illuminated signs and glass windows
red-tinted concrete pedestrian walkway with yellow lane markings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the downtown sidewalk, passing by concrete barriers on the right and large holographic billboards on the left. The environment features a mix of palm trees and futuristic architecture, with other pedestrians sharing the walkway. The scene maintains a dense urban atmosphere with continuous neon illumination from surrounding advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a sheltered, red-lit corridor into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic downtown intersection. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway defined by concrete pillars and intense red overhead lighting, moving steadily forward while the open street remains visible to the right. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a vast intersection dominated by the bright yellow signage of the Mishka Studios building and towering glass skyscrapers adorned with holographic billboards. The camera then follows the character across the wet asphalt of the wide crossing, where the reflections of neon lights shimmer as the Mishka Studios building shifts to the left. Finally, the movement continues along a dense urban sidewalk, passing concrete barriers and futuristic architecture interspersed with palm trees under the constant glow of surrounding advertisements.
